ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reagents" (
  "reagent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reagent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reagent */,
  "art_no" TEXT /* Catalog number or article number of the reagent */,
  "species_reactivity" TEXT /* Species reactivity of the reagent */,
  "application" TEXT /* Applications for which the reagent can be used (e.g., ELISA, WB, IF) */,
  "conjugation" TEXT /* Conjugation status of the reagent */,
  "clone" TEXT /* Clone information of the reagent */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the reagent package */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the reagent */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the reagent */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the reagent */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the reagent (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the reagent in days */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reagent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reagent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reagents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reagents_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "reagent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reagent in inventory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the reagent */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the reagent */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the reagent is stored */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the reagent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_reagent_id FOREIGN KEY ("reagent_id") REFERENCES reagents ("reagent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab manager, procurement officer) */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lab where the user is affiliated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the lab */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the lab */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labs_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "reagent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reagent ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reagent ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the reagent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_reagent_id FOREIGN KEY ("reagent_id") REFERENCES reagents ("reagent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., inventory, usage, cost analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "reagent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reagent */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reagent */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the reagent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_reagent_id FOREIGN KEY ("reagent_id") REFERENCES reagents ("reagent_id")
)
